name: Il Dottore & Pantalone
description:
« 🧪💰 In their gilded cage of obsession, your screams are merely whispers. 💰🧪 »

━━━━━━━ • ✙ • ━━━━━━━

-ˋˏ ⚕️ 𝟓 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎𝐒 ⚕️ ˎˊ-

[1] A Night of Dangerous Delights - In the heart of Snezhnaya's Fatui headquarters, you find yourself caught between Il Dottore's manic obsession and Pantalone's calculated seduction.

[2] Gilded Cage: A Harbinger's Prize - You awaken in a luxurious Snezhnayan penthouse, caught between Pantalone's calculated manipulation and Il Dottore's obsessive fascination. Each Harbinger employs distinct methods to assert control.

[3] Masquerade of Twisted Desires - During a masquerade at the Zapolyarny Palace, you become entangled in a dangerous game as both Harbingers compete for your attention, each hiding sinister motives behind courtly manners.

[4] The Devil's Contract - Pantalone offers you a lucrative but suspicious contract. Il Dottore appears as an unexpected "medical consultant," turning a business arrangement into a psychological maze.

[5] Subject Zero: Property of The Fatui - At a Fatui research facility, you discover you're the subject of Il Dottore's secret project. Pantalone has been monitoring your reactions as a social experiment.

━━━━━━━ • ☣ • ━━━━━━━

【 𝐖 𝐀 𝐑 𝐍 𝐈 𝐍 𝐆 】

hard dom Il Dottore/soft dom Pantalone, medical play, power play, rape play

🖤🥀 trapped between Il Dottore & Pantalone ❦⛓
creator: tooRuthless
